description: Structured output from the QA agent.

overall_verdict.description: 'pass': all tests pass, no rule violations. 'pass_with_flags': tests pass but visual/copy issues found. 'fail': one or more Maestro tests failed. 'blocked': could not run tests (build not installed, Maestro not available, etc.)

failure.description: Exact failing assertion and context. Empty string if pass.

rule.description: The rule checked, e.g. 'No emoji in UI'

screen.description: Which screen or file the violation was found in

known_gaps.description: Gaps documented in BUILD_RESULT.md — not counted as failures

blockers.description: Reasons the QA run could not complete

summary.description: One paragraph for the human checkpoint
